# STOA Platform Roadmap

> Last updated: 2026-02-27 | Target: v1.0 GA September 2026

## Vision

STOA is the European Agent Gateway — AI-native API management that bridges
legacy APIs to MCP-enabled AI agents. Define once, expose everywhere.

## Theme Details

### Gateway & MCP
Key capabilities: Rust gateway (axum/tokio), MCP protocol, OAuth 2.1, mTLS, Arena benchmarks.
- [x] MCP Gateway core + Keycloak auth
- [x] OAuth 2.1 proxy — DCR, PKCE, scope stripping (PR #528, #532, #541)
- [x] 4-mode architecture: edge-mcp, sidecar, proxy, shadow (ADR-024)
- [x] Arena 3-layer benchmark (L0 baseline, L1 enterprise, L2 platform verify)
- [~] Streamable HTTP transport
- [ ] Sidecar mode (Q2)
- [ ] Proxy mode (Q3)

### Platform Core
Key capabilities: Control Plane API (FastAPI), Console UI (React), Portal, RBAC, multi-tenant.
- [x] Control Plane API with CRUD + RBAC
- [x] Console UI with Keycloak auth + 4-persona RBAC
- [x] Developer Portal with API catalog
- [x] 7 gateway adapters (STOA, Kong, Gravitee, webMethods, Apigee, AWS, Azure)
- [~] Subscription lifecycle + API keys
- [ ] UAC engine — Define Once, Expose Everywhere
- [ ] Multi-tenant isolation

### Developer Experience
Key capabilities: CLI, SDK, quickstart, docs, tutorials.
- [x] Docusaurus docs site (101+ pages)
- [x] Docker Compose quickstart
- [x] llms.txt for AI discoverability
- [~] stoactl Go CLI
- [ ] Python + JavaScript SDKs
- [ ] Interactive playground

### Observability
Key capabilities: Metrics, Arena, Grafana, alerts, SLOs.
- [x] Arena L0 proxy baseline (k6, 30-min cron)
- [x] Arena L1 enterprise AI readiness (8 dimensions, hourly)
- [x] Arena L2 platform verification (3 CUJs, 15-min cron)
- [x] Pushgateway + Grafana dashboards
- [~] PrometheusRule alert definitions
- [ ] Distributed tracing (OpenTelemetry)

### Security & Compliance
Key capabilities: DORA, mTLS, OPA, Keycloak, audit.
- [x] Keycloak RBAC with 4 roles
- [x] Infisical secrets management (replaced AWS SM + Vault)
- [x] Kyverno enforce policies (restrict-privileged)
- [x] Security-scan CI pipeline (Gitleaks, Bandit, Trivy, Clippy SAST)
- [~] mTLS Stage 2 — full mesh
- [ ] DORA compliance documentation
- [ ] SOC 2 preparation

### Community & OSS
Key capabilities: Blog, SEO, contributors, Discord.
- [x] Blog with 12+ posts (hub & spoke SEO)
- [x] JSON-LD structured data on all pages
- [x] 3-pillar SEO strategy (Migration, MCP, Open Source)
- [~] Editorial calendar + weekly cadence
- [ ] Launch Week Q2
- [ ] Discord community
- [ ] Contributor rewards program
